full_text:
Cai Lin 蔡林
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cai Lin (蔡林). Officer of Zhuge Ke, he defected to Wei with his entire company at Xincheng. Cai Lin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
